headline: Why Is Kraft Heinz (KHC) Down 5% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: ‘Running out of money’: Kraft, McDonald’s, Whirlpool CEOs all issue same dire warning about US consumers. Get ready now
summary: “We’re seeing negative cash flows in the lower-income brackets where they’re dipping into savings.”
